title: Control Exchange
description: Structural schema companion for contract: process-run/v0. One request or response line of the control channel (line-delimited JSON over a local socket). Token verification (constant-time compare against the invocation key) and unknown-verb rejection are enforced by the serving process; malformed or schema-invalid requests fail closed.

token.description: The invocation key (lock-and-key). Presented on every request; there is no session state.

args.description: Verb arguments. Core: stop takes {"mode": "graceful"|"force"} (default graceful).

request_id.description: Optional client correlation id, echoed on the response.

result.description: Present when ok=true. Verb-specific: describe returns the card; status returns a status snapshot (see $defs.statusSnapshot for the recommended shape).

error.description: Present when ok=false. 'unauthorized' is the required error for a failed token check — indistinguishable for wrong-token vs unknown-token.

statusSnapshot.description: Recommended result shape for the status verb (additional producer fields allowed).
